channel.title: Kerberos on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Kerberos on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA PenTest+ (PT0-003): Attacks and Exploits
item.category: "CompTIA PenTest+ Course" , "Penetration Testing" , "Exploitation" , "Web Application Attacks" , "Wireless Attacks" , "Social Engineering" , "Cloud Attacks" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Offensive Security" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master attacks and exploits for the CompTIA PenTest+ PT0-003 exam. Learn network, host, web, authentication, wireless, social engineering, cloud, and specialized system attacks plus scripting.

item.title: CompTIA SecurityX (CAS-005): Security Engineering
item.category: "CompTIA SecurityX Course" , "Security Engineering" , "Cryptography" , "Hardware Security" , "Endpoint Security" , "OT Security" , "Automation" , "CASP+" , "Enterprise Security" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master security engineering for the CompTIA SecurityX CAS-005 exam. Learn IAM troubleshooting, endpoint and server security, hardware roots of trust, OT/ICS security, automation, and advanced cryptography.
